children.name: Welcome to the inside of my brain

children.name: Avid biologics is a biotech company that produces biologics. I’m in charge with supplementing with their social media and branding. Creating posts for linkedin and work for their offices, as well as illustrations to make them stand out against their competitors
children.characters: Avid biologics is a biotech company that produces biologics. I’m in charge with supplementing with their social media and branding. Creating posts for linkedin and work for their offices, as well as illustrations to make them stand out against their competitors

children.name: curious as to what i can offer you?
children.characters: curious as to what i can offer you?

children.name: well its branding, illustrations & iconography, social media content, and website design
children.characters: well its branding, illustrations & iconography, social media content, and website design

children.name: Let's make your business unforgettable. (In the good way.) You know that feeling when a brand just gets it? The logo, the colors, the whole vibe feels so right it's almost annoying? Yeah, that's what we're going for. Through research, art direction, and an illustrator's brain that never really clocks out, I build brand identities that turn heads and actually reflect who you are. No cookie-cutter anything. Just your brand, but make it iconic. Includes: Art Direction, Market Research, Logo Design & Brand Identity
children.characters:
Let's make your business unforgettable. (In the good way.)

You know that feeling when a brand just gets it? The logo, the colors, the whole vibe feels so right it's almost annoying? Yeah, that's what we're going for. Through research, art direction, and an illustrator's brain that never really clocks out, I build brand identities that turn heads and actually reflect who you are. No cookie-cutter anything. Just your brand, but make it iconic.

Includes: Art Direction, Market Research, Logo Design & Brand Identity

children.name: This is my love language. Seriously. Ask me to draw something and watch my eyes light up like a kid on Christmas. As an illustrator first, this is where I'm fully in my element, editorial pieces that make people stop and stare, custom icon sets that give your brand its own visual personality, and artwork that couldn't have come from anyone else. Stock illustrations? We don't know her. Includes: Editorial Illustration, Custom Iconography, Commercial & Conceptual Artwork
children.characters:
This is my love language. Seriously.

Ask me to draw something and watch my eyes light up like a kid on Christmas. As an illustrator first, this is where I'm fully in my element, editorial pieces that make people stop and stare, custom icon sets that give your brand its own visual personality, and artwork that couldn't have come from anyone else. Stock illustrations? We don't know her.

Includes: Editorial Illustration, Custom Iconography, Commercial & Conceptual Artwork

children.name: A website so you,(your mom) will finally understand what you do. No more "so what is it exactly that you make?" Your website should feel like walking into your world, not borrowing someone else's template and hoping for the best. I design UI experiences that are clean, beautiful, and easy to navigate because looking good and making sense shouldn't be mutually exclusive. And yes, the illustrator brain makes everything more interesting. You're welcome. Includes: UI Design, Layout & Visual Hierarchy, Brand-Aligned Web Experience
children.characters:
A website so you,(your mom) will finally understand what you do.

No more "so what is it exactly that you make?" Your website should feel like walking into your world, not borrowing someone else's template and hoping for the best. I design UI experiences that are clean, beautiful, and easy to navigate because looking good and making sense shouldn't be mutually exclusive. And yes, the illustrator brain makes everything more interesting. You're welcome.

Includes: UI Design, Layout & Visual Hierarchy, Brand-Aligned Web Experience

children.name: Because "I'll just post something later" is not a strategy. We've all been there. Staring at a blank grid wondering why nothing looks right. That's where I come in. From posts and story graphics to event invites and email headers, I create content that's cohesive, on-brand, and way too good to scroll past. Your audience will think you have a whole creative team. It'll be our little secret. Includes: Social Media Graphics, Post Templates, Digital Invitations, Email Headers & Banners

children.name: as you know my name is shruti
children.characters: as you know my name is shruti

children.name: I came up as an illustrator first, which means I see every design problem through an artist's lens. Where most designers think in grids and guidelines, I think in stories, characters, and visuals that make people feel something. That perspective is what makes the work different. And honestly? It's what makes it fun. Whether you're building a brand from scratch, need a website that finally looks like you, or just want your Instagram to stop looking like a cry for help, I got you.
children.characters:
I came up as an illustrator first, which means I see every design problem through an artist's lens. Where most designers think in grids and guidelines, I think in stories, characters, and visuals that make people feel something. That perspective is what makes the work different. And honestly? It's what makes it fun.

Whether you're building a brand from scratch, need a website that finally looks like you, or just want your Instagram to stop looking like a cry for help, I got you.

children.name: just some of my likes for fun
children.characters: just some of my likes for fun
